docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR FEB-21-2019 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS ([2]PLAINTIFF & [1]DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-16-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-01-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF KENNETH DOWLING IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EQUIFAX, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY NADIA REYNAGA-MORENO, LEGAL SUPPORT LEAD. DEFENDANT DECLINES STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIM APPEAL CALENDAR OF FEB-21-2019 DISMISSED - SETTLED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANN WONG, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED (525)
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF MAY-01-2019
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, WITH ATTACHED COPY OF COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOWLING, KENNETH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-18-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EQUIFAX, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOWLING, KENNETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EQUIFAX, INC. $1,620.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,695.00, FOR THE REASONS STATED IN THE ATTACHED MEMORANDUM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL OF NOTICE OF INTENT TO FILE SUIT **FILED WITH NOTICE OF INTENT TO FILE SUIT** FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOWLING, KENNETH AS TO DEFENDANT EQUIFAX, INC.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT EQUIFAX, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-01-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-01-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF KENNETH DOWLING IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EQUIFAX, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NADIA REYNAGA-MORENO, LEGAL SUPPORT LEAD. DEFENDANT EQUIFAX, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DARRELL VILLAMZ, DIRECTOR OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-01-2018 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT EQUIFAX, INC. MAILED TO RESPONDENT DOWLING, KENNETH
ORDER DISMISSING SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DOWLING, KENNETH AS TO DEFENDANT EQUIFAX, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-16-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT EQUIFAX, INC.
